action_text: Hover over a small bar near the far right of the chart to reveal its tooltip
rationale: We need the exact agent name and count for the minimum bar; hovering a very small bar near the right end should show the tooltip with this info.

action_text: Hover over the neighboring small bar near the right end of the chart
rationale: If the previous bar isn’t the minimum, hovering the adjacent small bar can reveal another candidate’s exact count to compare.

action_text: Hover over another small bar toward the right-middle of the chart
rationale: Continue scanning the smallest bars to find the absolute minimum; this bar appears slightly left of the previous ones.

action_text: Hover over an additional small bar near the right-middle to show its tooltip
rationale: To ensure we capture all agents tied at the minimum, hover an additional small bar likely representing another low count.
If tooltips are unreliable, opening the chart options may provide a “Show data” or drilldown to a table listing counts by agent.
